reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 2 (Trust Boundary) triggered. The self-peer bypass at validateDataColumn L37-38 accepts own messages without validation, allowing a local validator to publish invalid data columns that skip all gossip checks. However, this attack path requires a compromised or malicious local validator client. Per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json trust_assumptions, local_validator is SEMI_TRUSTED with in_scope_for_bug_bounty=false. The note states 'Configuration issues requiring operator error are typically out-of-scope.' This vulnerability requires the local validator (a trusted component) to be compromised, which places it outside the security model. Phase 01e property PROP-6a4369e9-post-002 from 01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json states 'After gossip validation acceptance, sidecar must have passed all REJECT checks in order.' The code factually violates this for self-originated messages, but the violation occurs only when a trusted boundary is breached.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: After gossip validation acceptance, sidecar must have passed all REJECT checks in order.
